title: Phononic lattice storage
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Phononic lattice storage''' was the method of data collection in the [[Death Star Library]], rather than the practice of holding [[Holobook/Legends|holobooks]], tapes, and [[Holocron/Legends|holocrons]]. It allowed for the storage of a large amount of information in a small space, something which the Death Star had only at a premium.

[[Atour Riten]] supervised droids that scanned information into the database from other media, which had extensive files, top-notch broadcast-to-reader circuitry, and retrieval systems thick with memory for faster downloads.

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]

[[Category:Data storage mediums]]
